IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18334783.pdf)
SUMMARY: Self-motivated individual with over 20 years' experience in managing diverse enterprises, project management, and HR. Expertise in document control, meeting planning, leadership, and staff development.
SKILLS: administrative, budget, contracts, customer service, documentation, expense reports, financial, government, hiring, HR, office administration, office management, payroll, personnel, processes, proposals, quality, quality assurance, sales, supervising, transmission

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Director/Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Managed the HR department, supervised administrative staff, handled hiring and payroll, reviewed invoices, managed office construction.

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: Executive Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2013 to January 2015
DESCRIPTION: Prepared reports, trained support staff, managed daily affairs, prepared bid proposals.

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: Senior Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2010 to January 2013
DESCRIPTION: Developed processes for support functions, compiled financial information, ensured timely contract and bid completion, provided document control.

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: Site Office Administrator
COMPANY: E.ON Climate and Renewables
DATES: 2006-2010
DESCRIPTION: Managed site office administration for a large wind power project, provided document control, coordinated information flows, served as main contact.

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Managed office for wind farms, oversaw document control and HR needs, facilitated staff/VIP visits.

SOURCE: 18334783.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Assisted the president, analyzed financial information for business expansion strategies.
